titleStmt.title: SII 34.136: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 136. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Piplikēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājarāja III, 3rd year, Kumbha, badi 12, Wednesday, Uttarāshāḍha = A.D. 1219, February 13, Wednesday.
This fragmentary inscription records a gift of land by a local Brāhmaṇa. The village is called Malari alias Śrīkaṇṭha-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Mīkōḻai-nāḍu in Pāṇḍyakulāsani-vaḷanāḍu on the south bank.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarāja devarkku yāṇṭu 3 vatu kumbha nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu dvādeśiyum putaṉ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇḍyakulācaṉivaḷa nāṭṭu mīkOḻai nāṭṭu brahmadeśa mala[riyāṉa śrīkaṇṭacaturvEti maṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruveṟumpiyūruṭaiya nāyaṉār kOyil ĀticaṇṭEśvaradevaṟkku Iṉṉāṭṭu malariyāṉa śrīkaṇṭaccaturvEti maṅkalattu valavūr mā ṉkārikaṭa ṉ
vvūr puṟavāyil kecamāṇikka vatikku mēṟku vāsutēva vākkālukku teṟkkum Ūrnattattukku teṟkkum mūṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟkaṇṭattu nilam kālē mukkāṇi Itil En Aṅcavōpāti nilam Iraṇṭē mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Eṅkaḷ tirilōcaṉa celva nampi pirāmaṇi piḷḷaiyār paṭṭar tanmatāṉam peṟṟu Iv
Digital edition of SII 34.136 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
